a.xlink:title: Base object for most other kinds of objects.
Live Object, base class for all objects that exist in the world.
Spot where keys are inserted into locks?
Pipe that JT can climb on.
Hole where rats come from/go to.
Lucky charm worn by Sly and Murray.
Alarm object that controls some sensors.
Missile (maybe the ones fired by smartguards?).
Dart gun used in High Class Heist?
Piranha fish used in Piranha Lake.
Stationary turret (maybe the one used in the murray levels).
Vault used for unlocking thief moves in levels.
Used for Murray in Murray's Big Gamble and King of the Hill.
Spire point that JT can balance on.
Rail that JT can walk/slide on.
Target point defined by a transform, radius, and some other data.
